title: CHILD SAFETY EQUIPMENT - 211info
text: BAMBINOS OREGON CHILD SAFETY EQUIPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides child safety equipment, such as car seats, baby gates, and outlet plugs. All products are ordered upon request. Parents are required to pick up and attend a carseat clinic to insure proper carseat installation. 322 Main Street Suite 200 Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Supplies can only be provided to the child's parent or primary caregiver (not child care providers or extended relatives) and is limited to 2 car seats per child Hours: By appointment Email (503) 623-4618 2 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 623-4618 ext 2 Michaela Peters [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: Car Seat Fee: $30 Cash/Venmo to be paid upon request for car seat appt. Car seat is ordered once fee is received. Grants available based on need. DOCUMENTS: Proof that dependant child resides at the same adress as client applying (WIC, OHP card, TANF, etc) AREA SERVED: Benton, Linn, Marion, Polk, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday/Thursday 9am-noon, Wednesday 3pm-6pm, 1st and 3rd Saturday of the month 1pm-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in Main Street Plaza, lower level. Next door to Food Bank. Services: Child Passenger Safety Seats Home Safety Devices Infant and Child Safety Education Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MENTORING MATERIAL GOODS - BASIC NEEDS SUPPLIES MATERIAL GOODS - NEW BABY GIFTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BAMBINOS OREGON
